decisions.decision: Haiku-only classification — Sonnet escalation removed entirely
decisions.rationale: Logs showed ~91% escalation rate (99/109 emails hit Sonnet) due to 0.8 confidence threshold. Haiku's calibration returns 0.6-0.79 even on clear-cut emails, so almost every email paid for both models. Removed escalation entirely — evaluate accuracy first, re-add Sonnet only if needed.

decisions.decision: Production deploy of Haiku-only build completed this session
decisions.rationale: docker compose pull + up -d ran successfully; app healthy

next_action: Top up Anthropic credits, then resume 03-05 Task 1: send 8 test emails and run verification queries
context_notes: Credits ran out mid-session. Took the opportunity to diagnose and fix the cost problem — changed from Haiku+Sonnet (91% double-billing) to Haiku-only. New build is live in production. Phase 3 verification (Wave 5, plan 03-05) is still pending — all 3 tasks are human-verify checkpoints waiting for manual testing.
